channel.title: Comments on: Oskar Blues G’Knight Imperial Red Ale (Gordon) – Ep. 126
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Brendan
item.dc:creator: Brendan
item.description: This is a good beer, i recently found it in CA. One of my favorites noobrew this year!
item.content:encoded: This is a good beer, i recently found it in CA. One of my favorites noobrew this year!

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: Have not tried it yet. Checking to see if it is available in Savannah. Keep the shows coming.
item.content:encoded: Have not tried it yet. Checking to see if it is available in Savannah. Keep the shows coming.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Marco, have you had this yet? I have to tell you, I know it's early, but Gordon is my pick for best beer in 2011!!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Marco, have you had this yet? I have to tell you, I know it’s early, but Gordon is my pick for best beer in 2011!!
